greeting.first_time: If you've come to finish me, get on with it. Otherwise, leave an old warrior to his silence.
greeting.returning: You return. The wind is still cold on this ridge.

main.text: The wind is cold on this ridge. Why have you stopped?

options.label: [Orc] Brother, what brought you to this state?
[Charisma 12] You look like you've seen better days. I have rations to spare.
I'm just resting here for a moment.

orc_brotherhood.text: He looks at you, surprised. 'Exiled for refusing a corrupt chieftain's command. Take my blade, brother. It's better in your hands than rusting with me.'

spare_rations.text: He eats ravenously. 'A strange kindness. I have little to give, but know this: the pass ahead is guarded by more than just stone. Watch the shadows.'

goodbye.text: He grunts and looks back into the fire.
